news.title:
SBI Trustee released pledged shares of HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank held as security for Sky Gold.
HDFC Bank's 2,52,356 shares and ICICI Bank's 2,12,101 shares, previously encumbered, are now fully released.
news.summary:
SBI Trustee released pledged shares of HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank held as security for Sky Gold.
HDFC Bank's 2,52,356 shares and ICICI Bank's 2,12,101 shares, previously encumbered, are now fully released.

news.title:
Nifty recovers 550 points from lows on Thursday, ending positive despite headwinds like oil at $110 and Dow futures down 600 points.
IT stocks, led by Coforge and LTIMindtree, and Nifty Bank, backed by HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank, drove the recovery.
news.summary:
Nifty recovers 550 points from lows on Thursday, ending positive despite headwinds like oil at $110 and Dow futures down 600 points.
IT stocks, led by Coforge and LTIMindtree, and Nifty Bank, backed by HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank, drove the recovery.

news.title:
Axis Securities retains Nifty Dec TP at 28,080; focuses on quality, earnings sustainability.
Adds Kotak Bank, Eternal, Nestle India to top picks; excludes Mahanagar Gas, HDFC Bank, Prestige Estate.
news.summary:
Axis Securities retains Nifty Dec TP at 28,080; focuses on quality, earnings sustainability.
Adds Kotak Bank, Eternal, Nestle India to top picks; excludes Mahanagar Gas, HDFC Bank, Prestige Estate.

news.title:
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and IDFC First Bank will announce Q4 FY26 results and dividend decisions in April.
Focus areas include NIM, asset quality, credit demand, and regulatory preparedness amid global challenges.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and IDFC First Bank will announce Q4 FY26 results and dividend decisions in April.
Focus areas include NIM, asset quality, credit demand, and regulatory preparedness amid global challenges.

news.title:
HDFC Bank penalizes 12 executives, including Ashish Parthasarthy, for alleged AT1 bond mis-selling.
No comments were provided by HDFC Bank or Parthasarthy regarding the allegations.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank penalizes 12 executives, including Ashish Parthasarthy, for alleged AT1 bond mis-selling.
No comments were provided by HDFC Bank or Parthasarthy regarding the allegations.

news.title:
Jefferies prefers banks like SBI, HDFC Bank, and Axis Bank over auto stocks, citing stable asset quality and credit growth.
Nifty target set at 25,000 with 10% upside; bull case sees 28,000 (+23%) if geopolitical risks ease and oil prices normalize.
news.summary:
Jefferies prefers banks like SBI, HDFC Bank, and Axis Bank over auto stocks, citing stable asset quality and credit growth.
Nifty target set at 25,000 with 10% upside; bull case sees 28,000 (+23%) if geopolitical risks ease and oil prices normalize.

news.title: HDFC Bank awaits a major decision on CEO Sashidhar Jagdishan's extension.
news.summary: HDFC Bank awaits a major decision on CEO Sashidhar Jagdishan's extension.

news.title:
HSBC maintains Buy on HDFC Bank but cuts target price to Rs 840 from Rs 990.
The cut reflects weaker earnings outlook, liability pressures, and potential asset risks.
news.summary:
HSBC maintains Buy on HDFC Bank but cuts target price to Rs 840 from Rs 990.
The cut reflects weaker earnings outlook, liability pressures, and potential asset risks.

news.title:
HSBC cuts target prices for Indian banks citing Iran conflict risks, asset-side pressures emerging.
HDFC Bank, ICICI, Axis, SBI, Bajaj Finance, & others see reduced targets; LIC Housing noted as defensive.
news.summary:
HSBC cuts target prices for Indian banks citing Iran conflict risks, asset-side pressures emerging.
HDFC Bank, ICICI, Axis, SBI, Bajaj Finance, & others see reduced targets; LIC Housing noted as defensive.

news.title:
Elara Capital identifies 20 stocks with upside potential after market correction due to geopolitical tensions.
Key picks include Maruti Suzuki, Eicher Motors, NTPC, HDFC Bank, and Apollo Hospitals, citing valuation comfort and growth visibility.
news.summary:
Elara Capital identifies 20 stocks with upside potential after market correction due to geopolitical tensions.
Key picks include Maruti Suzuki, Eicher Motors, NTPC, HDFC Bank, and Apollo Hospitals, citing valuation comfort and growth visibility.

news.title:
Nifty 50's 'April effect' faces challenges from US-Iran tensions, volatile crude prices, and FII outflows.
Banks like HDFC, ICICI, SBI, and Axis Bank are advised for stability; energy and metal sectors may benefit from commodity price surges.
news.summary:
Nifty 50's 'April effect' faces challenges from US-Iran tensions, volatile crude prices, and FII outflows.
Banks like HDFC, ICICI, SBI, and Axis Bank are advised for stability; energy and metal sectors may benefit from commodity price surges.

news.title:
Brokerages turn bullish on HDFC Bank after a 26% correction in 2026.
HDFC Bank fell 3.2% on Monday to Rs 731.8, underperforming Bank Nifty's 1.6% drop.
news.summary:
Brokerages turn bullish on HDFC Bank after a 26% correction in 2026.
HDFC Bank fell 3.2% on Monday to Rs 731.8, underperforming Bank Nifty's 1.6% drop.

news.title:
HDFC Bank shares hit a two-year low, losing over 25% in 2026.
Valuation premium over ICICI and Kotak erodes; JPMorgan upgrades to Overweight.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank shares hit a two-year low, losing over 25% in 2026.
Valuation premium over ICICI and Kotak erodes; JPMorgan upgrades to Overweight.

news.title:
Ex-HDFC Bank chair Atanu Chakraborty flagged governance issues, AT1 bonds, and ethical concerns post-resignation.
Chakraborty denied opposing the CEO's reappointment and highlighted global factors behind HDFC Bank's stock fall.
news.summary:
Ex-HDFC Bank chair Atanu Chakraborty flagged governance issues, AT1 bonds, and ethical concerns post-resignation.
Chakraborty denied opposing the CEO's reappointment and highlighted global factors behind HDFC Bank's stock fall.

news.title:
RIL to SBI 'Magnificent 7' stocks lose ₹3.28 lakh crore as Nifty drops 4%. Escalating Middle East war spooks investors.
RIL hit hardest, losing ₹87,690 crore due to windfall tax. SBI, HDFC Bank lose ₹70,000+ crore each amid oil price fears.
news.summary:
RIL to SBI 'Magnificent 7' stocks lose ₹3.28 lakh crore as Nifty drops 4%. Escalating Middle East war spooks investors.
RIL hit hardest, losing ₹87,690 crore due to windfall tax. SBI, HDFC Bank lose ₹70,000+ crore each amid oil price fears.

news.title:
Adani Ent, LIC, DLF, HDFC Bank, and Tata Group stocks hit 52-week lows amidst market downturn.
Geopolitical tensions, rising crude prices, and RBI measures create challenging equity market backdrop.
news.summary:
Adani Ent, LIC, DLF, HDFC Bank, and Tata Group stocks hit 52-week lows amidst market downturn.
Geopolitical tensions, rising crude prices, and RBI measures create challenging equity market backdrop.

news.title:
HDFC Bank chairman's sudden exit caused a $16B stock rout in India's largest private lender.
The leadership rift raises concerns over underperformance versus peers and CEO's role.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank chairman's sudden exit caused a $16B stock rout in India's largest private lender.
The leadership rift raises concerns over underperformance versus peers and CEO's role.

news.title:
HDFC Bank, PNB, Bandhan Bank revise ATM policies, effective April 1, 2026, impacting withdrawal limits and charges.
HDFC includes UPI in free ATM limits; PNB lowers debit card withdrawal limits; Bandhan caps non-bank ATM transactions.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank, PNB, Bandhan Bank revise ATM policies, effective April 1, 2026, impacting withdrawal limits and charges.
HDFC includes UPI in free ATM limits; PNB lowers debit card withdrawal limits; Bandhan caps non-bank ATM transactions.

news.title:
Jefferies maintains Buy on HDFC Bank, sets target price at Rs 1240.
Strong asset quality, healthy growth, and improving ROE cited as key factors.
news.summary:
Jefferies maintains Buy on HDFC Bank, sets target price at Rs 1240.
Strong asset quality, healthy growth, and improving ROE cited as key factors.

news.title:
Brokerages spotlight HDFC Bank, Jubilant FoodWorks, Eicher Motors, and ONGC. HDFC Bank garners 'Buy' ratings for strong ROE and valuations.
Eicher Motors upgraded to 'Neutral,' ONGC retains 'Overweight,' and Jubilant faces LPG challenges. RBI forex cap may hit large banks' Q4 earnings.
news.summary:
Brokerages spotlight HDFC Bank, Jubilant FoodWorks, Eicher Motors, and ONGC. HDFC Bank garners 'Buy' ratings for strong ROE and valuations.
Eicher Motors upgraded to 'Neutral,' ONGC retains 'Overweight,' and Jubilant faces LPG challenges. RBI forex cap may hit large banks' Q4 earnings.
